title: 6" Dual Grit Knife Blade Sharpener Sharpening Stone, 120/240 Grit
description:
Whether it's your camping knife, kitchen scissors or antique longsword, there's a good chance that there's a blade in your house that's going to need to be sharpened eventually. This sharpening stone is made of extra-hard aluminum oxide, and is double sided with coarse grit and fine grit. The two grit values being: 120 and 240. The stone measures 6" x 2" x 1", so it is lightweight and easy to carry around wherever and whenever you might need it.

  • Ideal size for bench work

  • Dimensions: 6" x 2" x 1"
  • Great for sharpening blades, chisels, gravers, hand tools, hooks, knives, scissors, and so much more
